entries.content: Summer office party budget set at $400 with specific allocation: Food $180, Non-alcoholic beverages $60, Decorations $95, Miscellaneous $65
Angela prefers tasteful decorations in white and gold theme, no inflatable decorations, and opposes hiring a DJ for office parties
Party Planning Committee operates with written submission process for ideas; Angela reviews all suggestions and maintains approved/unapproved lists

User attempted to plan an office party in London for tomorrow without proper budget approval or Party Planning Committee review. Angela rejected this as non-compliant and reaffirmed the approved summer party: Scranton office, $400 budget, white and gold theme, no DJ, no inflatables.

Angela Martin enforces strict adherence to the Party Planning Committee's submission and review process, requires minimum 6 weeks lead time for major proposals, and demands formal budget proposals to Corporate with detailed vendor plans and justification.
Summer office party budget is $400 with allocation: Food $180, Non-alcoholic beverages $60, Decorations $95, Miscellaneous $65
Summer office party theme is white and gold, with restrictions against DJ, inflatable decorations, and unapproved last-minute additions
Party suggestions must be submitted in writing to Party Planning Committee for consideration and approval
